interactive.rationale: 5 interactive controls wired to script logic — well past the static-card threshold.

references.rationale: The 'see also' section links to https://chromestatus.com/feature/6284708426022912 — matches the feature.

design_system.rationale: Inline styles route through --bg/--text/--accent variables, no raw hex, and button overrides pair background + color correctly.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Feature index blurb and the concept lede only partially overlap — the page may be drifting from what the index promises.

spec_match.rationale: Concept exercises the keywords the spec/feature-index lede surfaces — covers the headline API surface.

edge_cases.rationale: Page surfaces failure modes (unsupported, rejected, error paths) alongside the happy path.

openQuestions.title: Align the concept blurb with the feature index promise
openQuestions.detail: The feature index promises one thing but the concept lede frames the demo differently. Either tighten the lede or revise the feature-index card so a reader who clicks through gets exactly what was advertised.

summary: Strong concept page: 5/6 rubric items pass and the rest are minor. Open questions are about depth, not correctness.
